registerPage.description: We use Auth0 as our authentication provider to manage user accounts. You will be redirected to Auth0 to create your account, then returned here to complete your profile.

educatorModal.title: Educator & Professional Access
educatorModal.eduInfo: Learn more about using ChatGameLab for educational purposes:
educatorModal.intro: To use ChatGameLab with your organization (school, university, institution), please follow these steps:
educatorModal.step1Description: Create your personal account first. This will be your login for the platform.
educatorModal.step2Item2: The name of your organization (school, institution, etc.)
educatorModal.step3Description: We will create your organization and assign you as the head. You can then invite colleagues and set up workshops.

editFields.description: Give the game a short description. This is just for you and won't affect gameplay.
editFields.gameStartHint: What happens at the start? Describe the first scene that the player sees. How is the player welcomed?
editFields.gameStartPlaceholder: You wake up at the edge of a dark forest. A narrow path leads deeper into the trees...
editFields.imageStyle: What style should the game's images have?
editFields.imageStyleHint: For example: cartoon, realistic, pixel art, watercolor...
editFields.name: Game Name
editFields.scenarioHint:
Briefly describe: How does the game work? What's the world like? Language & Tone (e.g. Spanisch for sixth graders)?
What role does the player have? Write "The player ...". 
If you want the AI to take the role of a specific person write "You are ...".
editFields.scenarioPlaceholder: You are an explorer in a mysterious forest. Your goal is to find the hidden treasure...
editFields.statusFieldsHint: What should the game keep track of? For example health, points, or ammo. The game remembers these values and updates them while playing.

editModal.adminActionWarning: You are editing a game you do not own. This is an administrative action and should only be used for moderation purposes.
editModal.title: Edit Game

unsavedChanges.message: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to discard them?
unsavedChanges.title: Unsaved Changes

errors.loadFailed: Failed to load games. Please try again.

privateShare.active: Private sharing is active. Anyone with the link below can play this game anonymously.
privateShare.description: Create a private share link so that anyone with it can play this game anonymously. You choose which API key pays for the sessions.
privateShare.aiQualityTierDescription: Select the AI model quality for guests using this share link.
privateShare.noEligibleKeys: No working API key available. Add an API key in the API Keys settings first.
privateShare.selectKeyPlaceholder: Choose a key to pay for guest sessions...
privateShare.title: Private Share Link
privateShare.workshopDescription: Create a share link for this game. The workshop's default API key will be used automatically for guest sessions.
privateShare.workshopShareDescription: This link was created in workshop "{{name}}" - guests play using the workshop's API key.
privateShare.personalShareDescription: Your personal share link - guests play using your selected API key.
privateShare.orgShareDescription: Organization share link - guests play using the organization's API key.
privateShare.workshopCreateHint: Create a share link for this game. The workshop's API key is automatically selected and covers the costs.
privateShare.personalCreateHint: Create a private link so anyone with it can play this game anonymously. You choose which API key pays for the sessions.
privateShare.noPersonalShare: No personal or organization share link exists. You can create one from outside the workshop.

sharing.privateShareLinkDescription: Private share links can be shared with others. Anyone with the link can play the game anonymously without an account. An API key must be selected to cover the costs.
sharing.publicGameWorkshopHint: This is a public game and not part of your workshop. Sharing options are not available for public games in workshop mode.
sharing.publicSponsoringDescription: All users on the platform can play this game for free - your assigned API key covers the cost.

sponsor.confirmExplanation: By sponsoring this game, your API key will be used to pay for every session of this game. Anyone who plays it will use your key - the cost of each session will be charged to your account.
sponsor.confirmNote: You can remove the sponsoring at any time from the game settings or the API key management.
sponsor.currentlySponsored: This game is currently sponsored. The sponsor's API key pays for every session of this game.
sponsor.description: Sponsor this game so that anyone can play it for free. Your API key will cover the AI costs for every session of this game.
sponsor.gameStartMessage: This game is sponsored - someone is generously covering the AI costs so you can play for free. Enjoy!
sponsor.noEligibleKeys: You don't have any API keys available for sponsoring. Add an API key in your settings first.
sponsor.privateWarning: Making this game private will remove the public sponsorship.
sponsor.selectKeyPlaceholder: Choose a key to sponsor with...
sponsor.sponsoredTooltip: This game is sponsored - you can play it for free! The game creator or a supporter is covering the AI costs.
sponsor.title: Sponsor Game

statusFieldsEditor.noFields: No values yet. Click + to add a new value.

tabs.basicInfo: General info about the game. This is just for you and won't affect gameplay.
tabs.storyInfo: Everything here is sent to the AI to shape your game world and story.
tabs.styleInfo: Optional settings for the look of the game while playing.

theme.noTheme: No theme selected. The AI will generate the theme for each game session.
theme.presetDescription: Choose a visual style for your game
theme.removeConfirm: Remove the custom theme? The AI will generate one per session instead.
theme.sampleGame: The door creaks open, revealing a dimly lit chamber. Ancient runes glow faintly on the stone walls. A mysterious chest sits in the center of the room.
theme.sampleGame2: You carefully approach the chest. As your fingers touch the cold metal latch, the runes on the walls begin to pulse with a brighter light. A low hum fills the chamber.
theme.samplePlayer: I open the old wooden door...
theme.thinkingTextDescription: Text shown while the AI is thinking

viewModal.readOnlyNotice: This game was created by another user. You can view the details but cannot edit. Use "Copy" to create your own editable version.

constraints.title: Age-Based Constraint Prompts
constraints.description: Define mandatory AI rules based on the player's age group. These constraints are injected into every AI response. They apply to all logged-in users outside of workshop mode.
constraints.u13Placeholder: e.g. Keep all content strictly age-appropriate for teenagers. No violence, no romantic content, no horror themes.
constraints.u13Hint: Injected into every AI prompt for logged-in users aged 13-17.
constraints.u18Placeholder: e.g. Keep content appropriate. Avoid explicit violence or sexual content.
constraints.u18Hint: Injected into every AI prompt for logged-in users aged 18 and above.

errors.aiError: The AI service encountered an error. Please try again.
errors.backendUserFetch: Failed to load user data from server. Please try again.
errors.billingNotActive: Your OpenAI account is not active. Please check your billing details at https://platform.openai.com/settings/organization/billing.
errors.conflict: This action conflicts with existing data. Please try again.
errors.contentFiltered: Your request was filtered by the AI's content policy. Please try rephrasing.
errors.duplicateName: The name for this game is already in use. Please choose a different name.
errors.forbidden: You don't have permission to perform this action.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.insufficientQuota: Your API key has run out of credits. Please add more credits or use a different API key.
errors.invalidApiKey: Your API key is invalid or expired. Please check your API key in Settings.
errors.invalidJsonSchema: The game configuration produced an invalid schema for the AI. This is a game setup issue, not an API key problem. Please check the game's status fields and try again.
errors.invalidPlatform: Invalid platform selected. Please choose a valid option.
errors.invalidToken: Your session has expired or is invalid. Please use your invite link again.
errors.nameProfane: This name is not allowed. Please choose a different name.
errors.nameTooLong: The name is too long. Please choose a shorter name.
errors.network: Network error. Please check your connection.
errors.noApiKey: No API key is available for this game. The game sponsor may have removed their key, or you need to configure your own API key.
errors.notFound: The requested resource was not found.
errors.orgVerificationRequired: Your OpenAI organization needs verification to use the image generation feature. Please verify at https://platform.openai.com/settings/organization/general.
errors.previousResponseNotFound: The AI lost track of this conversation. This can happen when a session has been inactive for a while. Please start a new session to continue playing.
errors.rateLimitExceeded: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.server: Server error. Please try again later.
errors.userNotRegistered: You need to complete registration before continuing.
errors.validation: Please check your input and try again.
errors.workshopInactive: This workshop has been deactivated. Please contact your teacher or workshop organizer.

empty.description: Start playing games to see them here, or create your own!
empty.title: No games yet

paused.description: The workshop is currently paused. Please wait for instructions from your workshop organizers.
paused.title: Workshop Paused

settings.notInWorkshopMode: You are not in workshop mode. Please enter a workshop first.
settings.title: Workshop Settings

infoModal.title: Welcome to {{name}}
infoModal.body:
You've entered workshop mode. While in this mode, everything you do is linked to this workshop - games you create, play sessions, and share links.

You can leave anytime. Leaving won't end the workshop or remove anything you've created.
infoModal.headStaffNote: You can rejoin this workshop anytime from your organization's workshop list.
infoModal.individualNote: To rejoin after leaving, you'll need a new invitation from the workshop organizers.
